result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  konet [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  login <registry>  Log in to a registry
  build <path>      Builds the provided project into a binary, containerizes it, and publishes it.

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  konet [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  login <registry>  Log in to a registry
  build <path>      Builds the provided project into a binary, containerizes it, and publishes it.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Builds the provided project into a binary, containerizes it, and publishes it.

Usage:
  konet build [<path>] [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Project directory with the *.csproj

Options:
  -p, --platform <platform>   Comma-separated list of platforms to include in the multiarch image, e.g. linux/amd64,windows/amd64:1809
  -t, --tag <tag> (REQUIRED)  Tag
  -?, -h, --help              Show help and usage information

Options:
  -p, --platform <platform>   Comma-separated list of platforms to include in the multiarch image, e.g. linux/amd64,windows/amd64:1809
  -t, --tag <tag> (REQUIRED)  Tag
  -?, -h, --help              Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Log in to a registry

Usage:
  konet login <registry> [options]

Arguments:
  <registry>  Registry server

Options:
  -u, --username <username> (REQUIRED)  Username
  -p, --password <password> (REQUIRED)  Password
  -?, -h, --help                        Show help and usage information
